CustomField.description: Points awarded for this answer in the Linked_Form score. Equal to the resolved catalog Weight__c when Passed__c is true, zero when Passed__c is false, null when the answer has not been evaluated (no Pass_Criteria__c, scoring flag off, or trigger not yet run). Linked_Form__c.Score__c is the sum of this field across all answers in the response.
CustomField.label: Points Earned
